content: why havent i seen the brand details yet? whats taking so long?

Fair frustration. We're still in early Phase 1 and no tasks have been completed yet, so the brand details haven't been produced — nothing has been handed off to you because the work hasn't started or finished yet. This could be a sequencing issue, a resource gap, or a workflow that hasn't been triggered properly.

I'll flag this to EVE right now to find out exactly where the holdup is and get brand development prioritized.
